description: AlembicAgent side-effect doctrine record (P2 AD4, layer-contract config idiom). Doctrine (AD0 standing rule, user-adopted): no import-time work, no module-scope mutable state, no direct singleton reach-through in new/changed code; effects flow through injected ports. This file is the EXHAUSTIVE Agent-side blessed exception set; everything not listed is remediation scope. Human census: docs/side-effect-doctrine-census.md — edit both together.
doctrineRef: wakeflow-ledger/requirement-designs/alembic-portfolio-execution-plan/p0-unified-fact-freeze-2026-06-12.md (AD0 side-effect doctrine standing rule + whitelist draft, AD4 confirms)

blessedSingletons.name: ModelRegistry
blessedSingletons.reason: Named in the AD0 whitelist draft as 'ModelRegistry (Agent)'; lazy module singleton over declarative model definitions, no import-time work, no reset needed (stateless lookup tables).

blessedSingletons.name: LLMGateway
blessedSingletons.reason: Public ./ai facade singleton with an explicit reset hook and documented config-rebuild semantics (explicit config rebuilds the instance so later configs are never silently ignored). Container-managing it would change the public API — a STOP-class behavior change outside this behavior-preserving leg.

blessedSingletons.name: AgentEventBus
blessedSingletons.reason: Cross-strategy broadcast seam on the public runtime surface; resetInstance() removes all listeners and clears subscription state; max-listener bound declared (100). Agent-internal code only publishes; persistent subscriptions are host-owned lifecycles.

managedModuleState.name: proxyDispatcherCache
managedModuleState.policy: Bounded Map (cap 8) with close/destroy on eviction and null-caching of failed initialization; rationale documented in-file (undici proxy connection-pool reuse in the resident daemon).

managedModuleState.name: OutputCompressor parser loader
managedModuleState.policy: Write-once idempotent lazy-init flag (parsersLoaded) explicitly designed to avoid import-time parser module loading.

managedModuleState.name: HookSystem id counter
managedModuleState.policy: Monotonic uniqueness-only counter; all behavioral hook state is instance-scoped and dies with the per-run AgentRuntime.

outOfRepoSingletons.name: Logger
outOfRepoSingletons.agentUsage: 30 reach-through call sites across 28 files, constructor/function-scoped after the AD4 I1-I4 lazy conversions; injected-port end state is Core-leg / future-wave scope.

outOfRepoSingletons.name: timerRegistry
outOfRepoSingletons.agentUsage: 2 consumers, both with paired clear on dispose (TemporaryToolRegistry, SessionStore).

lintExemptions.reason: Write-once idempotent lazy-init flag (AD4 M2); boolean, so the null-slot idiom does not apply.
Monotonic uniqueness-only id counter (AD4 M3); behavioral hook state is instance-scoped.
Bounded cache with close-on-evict policy (AD4 M1, cap 8); deliberately module-scoped for daemon-wide undici connection-pool reuse.

standingExceptionsOutOfScope.name: SD-4 raw-SQL semantic_memories read adapter
standingExceptionsOutOfScope.rule: Standing declared exception per the AD2-confirmed charter; Option-C end-state trigger is a user register row. Not AD4 scope.

standingExceptionsOutOfScope.name: CapabilityV2 -> Capability inheritance reach-up
standingExceptionsOutOfScope.rule: Placement-class register item (B5), owned by the layer-contract blessing in config/layer-contract.json. Not AD4 scope.
